message:
test(forensic_export): add 29 property tests for forensic pipeline types

Covers serde roundtrip for all 15 serializable types (ForensicRecord,
ForensicActor, ForensicAction, ForensicTarget, ForensicPolicyDecision,
PolicyVerdict, ForensicOutcome, CorrelationIds, SensitivityLevel,
ForensicQuery, TimeRange, SortOrder, ExportFormat, ForensicTelemetry,
ForensicTelemetrySnapshot) plus behavioral invariants for ForensicStore
(ingest counting, capacity enforcement, eviction telemetry, empty query),
Display impl consistency, and sensitivity level ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
